title: sphaeralcea laxa
intro: Sphaeralcea laxa, also known as Desert Marigold, is a flowering plant species native to the deserts of North America, characterized by its bright yellow and orange flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Sphaeralcea laxa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The herbal preparations of Desert Marigold often involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from the plant's flowers and leaves, which can be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
